summary: Background section rewritten to focus on benign-vs-dangerous framing, presentation, and incidental detection.
Assessment section rebuilt as practical GP workflow including exam, bloods, and imaging.
Primary care management rewritten to directive if/then thresholds by cyst type and menopausal status.
Who to refer section aligned to explicit D&G tier order and labels.
